hero.title: Packers & Movers in Pune
hero.subtitle: Kothrud to Hinjawadi, Baner to Kharadi — 900+ verified movers across Pune.

intro:
Pune has grown into one of India's largest tech and education hubs, and so has the need for reliable movers. ShiftIndia offers 900+ verified packers and movers across every corner of Pune — Kothrud, Baner, Hinjawadi, Viman Nagar, Wakad, Kharadi, Hadapsar and more.

Instant quotes, transparent pricing, and vendors who understand Pune's gated communities and high-rise societies.
whyUs: Pune's weather shifts fast and many old-city buildings don't have lifts. Our vendors carry weather-proof packing, have strong manual lifting crews, and plan routes through the city's growing metro construction zones with ease.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Pune?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves start from ₹4,500. A 2 BHK move within Pune typically costs ₹7,500 – ₹13,000.

faqs.q: Do you cover Hinjawadi and Kharadi IT parks?
faqs.a: Yes — all of PCMC and Pune city including major tech hubs and outer zones.

faqs.q: Can I move on a Sunday?
faqs.a: Yes. Weekend slots are available at standard rates.
Yes — ₹5 lakh transit damage protection is automatic on every booking.
